title: Pinch to merge two cards
design_brief: Pinch two cards together to merge them.
mobile_reasoning: Two-finger pinch on overlapping cards triggers merge.

title: Sheet with sticky search header
design_brief: Sheet content scrolls; search header sticks.
mobile_reasoning: Search outside ScrollView in sheet body.

title: FlashList with end footer (load more, empty state)
design_brief: List footer for 'load more' button or empty state.

title: Multi-select with chip view
design_brief: Select from list, selected shown as chips above.
mobile_reasoning: Chips for selected + list of options.

title: Splash screen with brand reveal
design_brief: Splash transitions to home with brand animation.

title: Slide transition between months in calendar
design_brief: Tap month nav → grid slides horizontally to new month.

title: Animated step indicator with color
design_brief: Step indicator where active step color fills line behind.
mobile_reasoning: Skia line segment with color interpolation.

title: In-app voice call UI
design_brief: Active call screen: avatar, mute/end buttons, timer.
mobile_reasoning: WebRTC outside scope; UI for call state.

title: Map clustering preserve selection
design_brief: Selected marker stays highlighted even after cluster reform.
mobile_reasoning: Selection id tracked separately from cluster data.

title: Tile widget for compact metrics
design_brief: Compact tile (Apple Watch-style complication) for one metric.
mobile_reasoning: Small square card with icon + value + label.

title: Liquid glass: animated gel buttons
design_brief: Buttons that look like liquid (highlighted, refractive).

title: Notification permission flow with rationale
design_brief: Before requesting notification permission, show rationale.
solution: // requestNotifications.ts\nimport * as Notifications from 'expo-notifications';\nexport async function requestWithRationale(showRationale: () => Promise<boolean>) { const ok = await showRationale(); if (!ok) return; const {status} = await Notifications.requestPermissionsAsync(); return status; }

title: Touch target padding for tappable items
design_brief: Apply minimum 44pt touch target via padding/hitSlop.

title: Avoiding inline functions in renderItem
design_brief: Stable renderItem prevents recycler from invalidating.

title: Image overlay drawing with multiple layers
design_brief: Photo with multiple draw layers (annotations, text).

title: Map with weather overlay
design_brief: Map shows weather tiles (e.g., precipitation).

title: Annotated bar chart with target line
design_brief: Bar chart with horizontal target line.

title: Page header that crossfades on tab change
design_brief: Tab switch crossfades header title.
mobile_reasoning: Title opacity animates on tab change.

title: Particle trail follow finger
design_brief: Drag finger across screen → particles trail with gravity.
mobile_reasoning: Particles emitted at gesture point; physics + fade.

title: Photo collage export as image
design_brief: Export collage as single image to share.

title: Universal back: cmd+left on tablet keyboard
design_brief: Hardware keyboard arrow left = back nav (iPad).

title: Form with conditional sections based on toggles
design_brief: Toggle reveals additional sections; layout flows smoothly.

title: Auto-play next on swipe up (vertical TikTok-style)
design_brief: Vertical video feed; swipe up to next.
mobile_reasoning: Vertical paged FlashList with prefetch + autoplay on focused item.

title: Gradient masked text
design_brief: Text with gradient fill via MaskedView.
mobile_reasoning: MaskedView or Skia Text with shader.

title: useRef vs useState for non-rendering data
design_brief: Use useRef for data that doesn't affect render.

title: Audio recording with countdown beforestart
design_brief: 3..2..1 countdown before recording starts.

title: Map with floating action button (FAB) for current location
design_brief: FAB lower-right re-centers map on user.

title: Bubble chart with size-encoded data
design_brief: Bubble chart: x, y, size dimensions.
mobile_reasoning: Skia circles with radius from data.

title: Glass morphism toolbar
design_brief: Translucent toolbar with native blur.
mobile_reasoning: BlurView on iOS, opaque on Android.

title: Dynamic Island integration (iOS 16+)
design_brief: Long-running task shows in Dynamic Island (Live Activity).
mobile_reasoning: expo-live-activity or native iOS Live Activity.
